TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tsai_Ing-wen, title = Tsai_Ing-wen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tsai_Ing-wen} }

S.FORM: Tsai Ing-wen I 1956 a miheca saka 8 a folad saka 31 a romi'adÔľć saka ci Tsai Ing-wen, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Taiwan anini i ci Tsai Ing-wen, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 20 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: tsai iŇč-w…ôn i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ* saka ¶i tsai iŇč-w…ôn, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u taiwan anini i ¶i tsai iŇč-w…ôn, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Tsai Ing-wen I 1956 a miheca saka 8 a folad saka 31 a romi'adÔľć saka ci Tsai Ing-wen, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Taiwan anini i ci Tsai Ing-wen, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 20 a romi'ad.
